blocks.title: Ask About Time
blocks.context: You want to know the time, the day, and when to meet.
blocks.goal: Ask and answer simple time questions.
usefulPhrases: अब कितने बजे हैं? (What time is it now?)
आज कौन सा दिन है? (What day is it today?)

blocks.prompt: Ask 3 questions in Hindi about time, day, and location. Then answer them in short sentences.
